creator: robtone@ek-muc.de
text:
On Wed, Apr 15, 2009 at 03:17:36PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of mail/postfix-policyd-weight,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/133753 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/133753


Patch approved. Thank you.


-- 
    Robert Felber (PGP: 896CF30B)
    Munich, Germany
